settings_hero_title.message: Manage language, page style, local archive, and export access in one place.

settings_hero_text.message: These controls shape how GPTgps feels when you open the extension and how much local conversation context stays ready for reuse.

settings_group_workspace_title.message: Set the language and visual mood of the extension pages.

settings_group_workspace_text.message: The theme can follow the AI tab you are currently using, or stay locked to one provider style.

settings_language_text.message: Change the language used on the settings page. The page refreshes after switching.

settings_theme_text.message: Follow the current AI site automatically, or lock the extension pages to one provider style.

settings_group_archive_title.message: Choose how much local history GPTgps keeps and surfaces.

settings_group_archive_text.message: These options only change your local archive and extension controls. They do not remove the original chat from the AI site.

settings_history_text.message: Turn off local saving if you want GPTgps to stop storing new threads on this browser.

settings_auto_delete_text.message: Delete local threads older than 30 days if they are not bookmarked.

settings_auto_delete_toggle.message: Enable automatic cleanup for unbookmarked local threads

settings_export_buttons_text.message: Show or hide the export dropdown menu inside supported AI chat pages.

settings_export_buttons_toggle.message: Show export button menu in chat pages

settings_auto_send_text.message: When you continue from the archive, GPTgps can send the prepared context automatically.

settings_auto_send_toggle.message: Automatically send context when continuing a conversation

settings_group_links_text.message: Use these links to follow development, report issues, or browse the source code behind GPTgps.

settings_link_profile_text.message: Open the maintainer account on GitHub.

settings_link_repo_text.message: View the GPTgps source code, issues, and updates.
